results.title: Richard Madden says he's 'just gettin started' as he celebrates birthday
results.description: Renfrewshire-born actor Richard Madden said he is “just getting started” as he celebrated his birthday recently.

results.title: PICTURES - Hundreds of pirates take over Poole Quay for annual pirate festival
results.description: Hundreds of pirates and thousands of spectators flocked to Poole on Saturday for the town’s annual Harry Paye Day.
